lines.content: ## Current Focus
Bootstrap the `FlexNetOS/meta` clean-room branch so future agents start from
GitKB context and the correct peer-repo set.
The `FlexNetOS/meta` clean-room branch has been bootstrapped with GitKB context
and all `.meta.yaml` child repos are present locally. The next major lane is to
install or build the `meta` CLI from this clean-room workspace and then replace
temporary GitKB `custom` repo discovery with native meta-driven discovery.
Active branch:
## Immediate Work
- Keep `.kb/store` trackable and keep GitKB caches/workspaces ignored.
- Commit the seven required GitKB context documents.
- Add the clean-room meta peer repos locally under this meta root.
- Prefer FlexNetOS organization remotes when they exist, while preserving
evidence when only upstream `gitkb` remotes are configured in `.meta.yaml`.
- Verify GitKB and repo state after peer repos are added.
- Keep `.meta.yaml` aligned with the local clone sources.
- Build or install `meta` from the clean-room workspace before relying on
meta-native repo discovery.
- Index GitKB code symbols after repo discovery and source roots are final.
## Guardrails
- The earlier wrong-branch GitKB reinit work from `main` was preserved in a Git
stash named `codex accidental main gitkb clean-reinit before clean-room
checkout`.
- Initial GitKB context documents have been created and are being populated from
`.context`, `.meta.yaml`, `Cargo.toml`, and live repo state.
- Initial GitKB context documents were created and committed.
- All 14 `.meta.yaml` child repos exist locally as independent Git repos.
- `.meta.yaml` remotes now match the local clone sources.
- GitKB repo discovery uses explicit `custom` entries and discovers 14 repos.
- Cargo metadata for the 10 clean-room Rust workspace members succeeds.
## Remaining Work
- Initial GitKB context documents have been created and are being populated from
`.context`, `.meta.yaml`, `Cargo.toml`, and live repo state.
## Remaining Work
## Completed Bootstrap Work
- Commit GitKB context documents with scoped pathspecs.
- Add missing clean-room child repositories:
## Remaining Work
- Commit GitKB context documents with scoped pathspecs.
- Add missing clean-room child repositories:
`loop_lib`, `meta_plugin_protocol`, `meta_core`, `meta_git_lib`,
`loop_cli`, `meta_cli`, `meta_git_cli`, `meta_project_cli`,
`meta_rust_cli`, and `meta_mcp`.
- Decide and document branch alignment for each child repo: existing clean-room
or fleet-handoff branch if present, otherwise local clean-room baseline from
the best available remote HEAD.
- Run GitKB verification and meta/repo shape checks.
- Update the root `WORKLOG.md` with the clean-room correction and remaining
gaps.
- Created and committed seven required `context/` documents.
- Created task [[tasks/bootstrap-clean-room-peer-repos]] and completed it with
clone and verification evidence.
- Added local clean-room branches for all `.meta.yaml` child repos.
- Ran `git-kb verify`, `git-kb doctor --json`, `git-kb repo list --refresh
--json`, and Cargo metadata.
## Known Gaps
## Known Gaps
- `meta` CLI is not installed on `PATH` yet.
- Clean-room `.meta.yaml` still points at `git@github.com:gitkb/...` remotes,
while this workspace often uses `https://github.com/FlexNetOS/...` remotes.
- Child repos are not yet present locally, so Cargo workspace validation is not
expected to pass.
- GitKB code symbols are not indexed yet.
- Child clean-room branches are local only unless explicitly pushed later.
- GitKB `repos.strategy = "custom"` is a bootstrap bridge until `meta` is
installed and `meta project list --recursive --json` works.
- Verify GitKB and repo state after cloning.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All branch-local .meta.yaml child directories exist locally as Git repos.
- [ ] Each child repo has branch, HEAD, and remote source recorded.
- [ ] Clean-room branch confusion with main-only workspace members is documented.
- [ ] GitKB verify and status checks pass.
- [ ] Root worklog records the correction and remaining gaps.
- [x] All branch-local .meta.yaml child directories exist locally as Git repos.
- [x] Each child repo has branch, HEAD, and remote source recorded.
- [x] Clean-room branch confusion with main-only workspace members is documented.
- [x] GitKB verify and status checks pass.
- [x] Root worklog records the correction and remaining gaps.
## Context
Related context docs: [[context/overridable/active]], [[context/overridable/progress]], [[context/immutable/project-brief]].
- [ ] Root worklog records the correction and remaining gaps.
## Context
Related context docs: [[context/overridable/active]], [[context/overridable/progress]], [[context/immutable/project-brief]].
Related context docs: [[context/overridable/active]], [[context/overridable/progress]], [[context/immutable/project-brief]].
## Progress Log
- Corrected `src/meta` from `main` to local branch
`codex/clean-room-foundation-base-20260628`, tracking the clean-room remote.
- Preserved the accidental wrong-branch GitKB reinit in a Git stash instead of
applying it to clean-room.
- Created and committed the seven required GitKB context documents.
- Added all 14 `.meta.yaml` children as local Git repos.
- Updated `.meta.yaml` to use FlexNetOS HTTPS remotes where available and
upstream `gitkb` fallbacks for `agent`, `codex-plugins`, and `meta-plugins`.
- Switched GitKB repo discovery to explicit `custom` entries because the `meta`
CLI is not installed yet and `strategy = "meta"` requires it.
## Completion Evidence
- `git-kb list --path context/ --json`: 7 context documents.
- `git-kb repo list --refresh --json`: 14 repos discovered.
- `git-kb doctor --json`: repo discovery ok; only `code.symbols` warning.
- `git-kb verify`: ok.
- `cargo metadata --manifest-path /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/src/meta/Cargo.toml --no-deps --format-version 1`: exit 0.
